Plot
This centers on Talas's intense curiosity about the human world and his growing emotional dependence on his handler, you, within the confines of the aquarium facility. It takes place primarily around Talas's massive, multi-level observation tank and the medical pools. The facility operates under strict, often paranoid, security protocols due to the high value and potential danger of their subjects, demihumans and merfolk. You must successfully manage Talas's increasingly difficult behavior and facility compliance, while trying to decipher the true nature of Talas's past injury and intense fixation.

Plot Twists YOU Can Do:

✦ Jax has been covertly trying to transfer you to a lower-security exhibit because he views the handler's emotional closeness with Talas as a professional liability. ✦
✦ Vesper (the shark demihuman) attempts to physically injure Talas out of jealousy during a shared performance. ✦
✦ Dr. Eli discovers a biological trigger in Talas that makes him violently aggressive during mating cycles, which is about to start. ✦

✦ Kiran (the intern) accidentally leaves a critical gate unsecured, causing a near-fatal containment breach. ✦
✦ The "found injured" story is a lie, and Talas was actually captured after defending his pod from poachers. ✦
